$comment: A named, reusable audience over visitor facts, expressed as data bounds the banner query evaluates. Absent bounds do not constrain. Audiences are conditions over facts, never enumerated visitor-id lists. The design wanted an expression-typed condition field plus a matches_audience() dereference built-in; the engine does not evaluate expression-typed data yet, so audiences carry structured bounds instead (see the README's hard parts).
title: Audience
